title.en: Biocompatibility evaluation of breathing gas pathways in healthcare applications - Part 1: Evaluation and testing within a risk management process (ISO 18562-1:2024)
title.zh: 医疗保健应用中呼吸气路的生物相容性评价 - 第1部分：风险管理过程中的评价和试验

standards.scope: Biocompatibility evaluation of breathing gas pathways - General requirements
standards.abstract: Specifies the general requirements for assessing the biocompatibility of the materials used in breathing gas pathways.

title.en: Biocompatibility evaluation of breathing gas pathways in healthcare applications - Part 2: Tests for emissions of particulate matter (ISO 18562-2:2024)
title.zh: 医疗保健应用中呼吸气路的生物相容性评价 - 第2部分：颗粒物排放试验

standards.scope: Biocompatibility evaluation of breathing gas pathways - Particulate matter emissions
standards.abstract: Specifies tests for particulate matter emissions in breathing gas pathways of medical devices to assess biocompatibility.

title.en: Biocompatibility evaluation of breathing gas pathways in healthcare applications - Part 3: Tests for emissions of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) (ISO 18562-3:2024)
title.zh: 医疗保健应用中呼吸气路的生物相容性评价 - 第3部分：挥发性有机化合物(VOCs)排放试验

standards.scope: Biocompatibility evaluation of breathing gas pathways - Volatile organic compound emissions
standards.abstract: Specifies tests for emissions of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) in breathing gas pathways of medical devices.

title.en: Biocompatibility evaluation of breathing gas pathways in healthcare applications - Part 4: Tests for leachables in condensate (ISO 18562-4:2024)
title.zh: 医疗保健应用中呼吸气路的生物相容性评价 - 第4部分：冷凝液中可沥滤物的试验

standards.scope: Biocompatibility evaluation of breathing gas pathways - Leachables in condensate
standards.abstract: Specifies tests for leachables in condensate from breathing gas pathways of medical devices.
